templates.name: Invite to intake form
templates.body: Hi! I'm from WikiPrice Uganda — we help Kampala shoppers find verified prices from real shops. We'd love to list your business (free basic listing). Reply or fill this short form: https://wikiprice1.netlify.app/for-sellers.html — thanks!

templates.name: In-person visit follow-up
templates.body: Hi {name}, great meeting you at {arcade} today. WikiPrice is adding verified sellers with clear stall locations. We'll publish your listing once we confirm your prices. WhatsApp us anytime if prices change.

templates.name: Public comment (soft invite)
templates.body: Love these prices! WikiPrice UG is building a verified deals directory for Kampala — DM if you'd like a free listing with your shop location so buyers can find you easily.

trackerSeed.notes: Handle unknown — Eden Mall visit scheduled
